title: R1 Distill Qwen 32B TIR LoRA
subtitle: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B fine-tuned with LoRA on NuminaMath-TIR
description:
# R1-Distill-Qwen-32B + LoRA (TIR)

LoRA adapter (rank 32) fine-tuned on 10K NuminaMath-TIR examples. Teaches code-integrated reasoning.

## Usage
Merge with base model: `PeftModel.from_pretrained(base, this_adapter).merge_and_unload()`

Or use the pre-merged version: tantheta/r1-tir-merged (dataset)

## Results
5/10 on AIMO3 IMO-level reference problems
